title: triticum dasystachyum
intro: Triticum dasystachyum, also known as wild emmer, is an ancient wild grass species in the wheat family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Triticum dasystachyum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of ailments, from respiratory issues to skin conditions.
